Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Subpoenas; Request For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2546.00; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Eduardo A. Brito; And Exhibits
Off Calendar Nov-06-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Eduardo A. Brito, Esq., LA INjury Attorneys, Telephone ( 818) 243-4529, appearing for plaintiff Maria Kossiavelos;
Jean Teng, Esq., Murchison & Cumming, LLC., Telephone (415) 524-4300, appearing for defendant Starwood Hotels;

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MARIA KOSSIAVELOS'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas; Request For Imposition Of Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $2546.00

The motion is DENIED as moot. The Plaintiff's request for sanctions is DENIED. Normally, some amount of sanctions would be appropriate. The circumstances of this case call for a different result. In their reply brief, the Plaintiff asserts that the press of time required the short window for response to Plaintiff counsel's original meet and confer letters prior to filing this motion. In particular, counsel noted the soon-approaching return date on the subject subpoenas. However, the subpoenas appear to have been originally signed on September 10, a full 17 days before counsel sent his first meet and confer letters. Accordingly, it appears that counsel bears at least some responsibility for the professed press of time.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
